note: Seeded from the hand-curated menu. Overwritten by the Toast sync (assets/menu.json) once TOAST_* secrets run.

categories.title: All Things Eggs
categories.sub: Comes with toast & smashed garlic fried potatoes when logical.

categories.title: Green Things
categories.sub: All salads come with grilled bread.

categories.title: Between Bread
categories.sub: Sandwiches come with fries, small salad or house spuds & something pickled.

items.desc: Poblano pesto and jack cheese rumbled with eggs, sidled by seared city ham.
Red pepper, carrots, mushrooms, peas, spinach and provolone. Choose eggs or tofu.
Mussolini's fave — a rumble of eggs with fresh mozzarella, basil, tomatoes, & green olives.
Wild'n'mild 'shrooms, caramelized onion, smoked gouda & greens rumbled with eggs.
Two eggs any style, crispy flour tortilla, black beans, jack cheese, jalapeños, pico & sour cream.
Seared flank steak straddlin' a wildwest sauce, two eggs fried easy to hard & yippee kayay…pick your toast.
Simply two eggs ($7.95), or two eggs with meat ($9.95).
Hot spiced beef brisket, potatoes, beets & greens with horseradish-mini scallions.
Two crab chubs alongside a pair of eggs any style with a green chili tartar.
Chorizo, scrambled eggs, house spuds & cheddar swaddled in a flour tortilla, topped with pico & sour cream.
An omelette replete with pepper bacon, spinach, avocado, tomato & cheddar.
Hot Italian sausage, peppers, onion, spinach & provolone stuffed in an omelette.
An omelette filled with black beans, cheddar, chips, topped with pico & sour cream.
With sautéed apples, cherries & cinnamon syrup.
House mixed nuts, seeds & honey rolled oats with coconut, banana & vanilla yogurt.
Daily flavor.
Plain ($6) or with dried cherries & vanilla ice cream ($7.95).
A 'Wunder' not to be missed. Greens, mushrooms, ham, salami, provolone, ceci beans & olives chopped together with creamy herb. Sm $12.95 / Lg $15.95.
Black beans, tomatoes, avocado, cheddar, greens, crispy tortillas, sour cream & guajillo dressing.
Greens, feta, beets, kalamata olives, red onion, grape tomato, cucumber & chick peas with tomato vinaigrette.
Mixed greens, shaved onion, grape tomatoes. Choice of dressing. Side: $3.95.
Pepper bacon, lettuce, tomato & avocado on sourdough with garlic aioli.
Mushrooms, carrots, peppers, spinach, tomatoes & provolone in a flour tortilla with house mustard and poblano herb pesto schmear.
North African spiced chicken thighs, jack cheese, caramelized onion on grilled sourdough with lemony garlic aioli.
Flank steak on grilled sourdough with swiss, balsamic onions, spinach, tomato & grainy mustard.
A toasty mix of salami, sausage, sweet & hot peppers, olives, caramelized onion, hot mustard & provolone on a house roll.
Brined brisket sliced thin and served warm with cool cabbage, smoked gouda & caramelized onion on grilled rye with jalapeño mustard.
A grilled three-cheese on sourdough with kimchi, lil' pink mayo, cheddar & jack, topped with American cheese and baked until bubbling.
A ½ lb. of seasoned ground beef, house roll, Buzz Sauce & all the standard fixin's.
Same as the burger, but for our vegetarian friends.
Shaved cucumber, ginger lime aioli & all the standard fixin's.
Two crab chubs, red chili greens, green chili tartar.
Brown rice, roasted mushrooms, veggies, tofu, red chilies, tamari & sesame. + chicken $15.95 / shrimp $16.95.
Chilled wheat noodles tossed in sambal peanut sauce with snap peas, basil, scallions and pickled cabbage. Grilled chicken or tofu.
Cheddar, smoked gouda & blue with cavatappi pasta, caramelized onion & herbs.
Lemongrass and Thai chili broth with wheat noodles, sesame, roasted mushrooms, veggies. Chicken/tofu/shrimp.
Shrimp, fettuccine, cajun cream, tomatoes, scallion and parmesan.
Smashed garlic fried potatoes.
Mixed greens, choice of dressing.
Sourdough, multigrain or rye.
Bottomless cup.
With whipped cream.
Half iced tea, half lemonade.
